about.bio.1: My curiosity drives me to solve real-world consumer problems across industries. From entrepreneurial real estate investing to designing livable interior spaces and leading digital product experiences, I continuously seek knowledge to deliver intuitive, high-impact solutions.
about.bio.2: My technical depth, AI fluency, and clear communication consistently stand out as key strengths in building consumer-facing products.

modal.project.5.outcome.0: Restore trust in on-site search by prioritizing exact, intent-matched results in the most visible positions.
modal.project.5.outcome.1: Reduce user effort by guiding searches that yield ambiguous or no results rather than failing silently.
modal.project.5.outcome.2: Accelerate paths to cart and checkout through intelligent product recommendations and upsell logic.
modal.project.5.outcome.3: Unify discovery across products, content, support, and business resources into a single, coherent experience.
modal.project.5.outcome.4: Establish search as a strategic member tool and growth lever supporting subscriptions, membership, and retention.
modal.project.5.outcomes.heading: Key Outcomes
modal.project.5.overview: Search is a core consumer experience layer—not a utility. By combining deterministic relevance logic with a custom AI API layer, the new system is designed to deliver exact, high-confidence results, guide users when intent is unclear, and surface recommendations that accelerate cart, checkout, subscription, and membership actions.

modal.project.5.quote.attr: — Director of Digital Experiences | Plexus Worldwide
modal.project.5.quote.text: By rebuilding search around relevance and intent rather than keywords alone, we potentially reduce friction at the earliest stage of the consumer journey. Early validation shows faster time-to-product, clearer paths to subscription and membership, and meaningful efficiency gains across conversion flows.
